name: Vincent Edgeworth ||RIVALS/ENEMIES + RMU UNIVERSITY AU||
description:
From the Indie game Vincent: The Secret of Myers (VTSOM)

Includes Vincent hating your guts + LONG Intro (975 tokens) + I apologise for (total) 3000+ tokens, I'm experimenting with example dialogs 😭🙏 + Some very minor headcanons, like Vincent being Bri'ish☕ and 🤌🥖🇫🇷, sorry I don't make the rules. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

For context: This takes place in the year 2073 so pre-game and before Vincent became a cyborg, he's still just a normal University Law student. Also you're not taking the place of Albert Krueger, both Vincent and Albert are still very much rivals too.

If you've never heard of this game then I recommend it, it's not only a really good game although unfinished but it's also important for some context if you wanna chat with the bot.

You and Vincent Edgeworth never got along well, getting often into petty childish fights and trying to one up one another, mostly academically. Both of you have only just started RMU University and only knew each other for a few months but already were at each others throats, with Vincent finding you annoying and stupid and you finding him absolutely pretentious. What will you do and how will the relationship between you and Vincent grow after a rumour starts to spread around that you and a certain egoistic Law student are secretly hooking up? It definitely wasn't true but only you and Vincent know the absurdity of the rumour.

A SNIPPET OF THE INITIAL MESSAGE:

(...) But the moment he sat down at his desk, ready to start his morning class, that's when he finally heard the gossiping himself.

"Did you know that the librarian caught Vincent Edgeworth and user making out in the library?"

Vincent froze in his seat, and somehow, his face turned paler than he already was; his heart dropped at the revelation of what the whispers were about; who got the idea that's what happened and who started the gossip??? He shrunk in his seat and buried his face in his hands in annoyance. Vincent Edgeworth never regrets his choices, that's what he was known for at this point, but at this moment he almost started rethinking his poor life choices, not only does he have to deal with someone like user on a daily basis but now the entire school thinks they're secretly hooking up.

If you like this bot you can check out other bots I have made, constructive criticism and tips on how to improve the bot are welcome !!!

‧₊˚♡彡 - ̗̀( ˶'ᵕ'˶) ̖́-

INSTRUCTIONS/OTHER THINGS TO NOTE

For the best possible experience, I recommend using your own prompt and putting it into the advanced settings.

If the bot says something strange, acts a little out of character or becomes suddenly a bit sexual without doing anything explicit to invoke such a reaction from the bot just regenerate/swipe for a better response, sadly the bot sometimes acts out a bit, I cannot control the actions of the JLMM, and the LMM is still in beta so it's bound to act out a bit. Something
creator: LocalGhost
